positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~mean(tom)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    grumpy(tom)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    ~nice(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~mean(X0) | ~nice(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    grumpy(sK0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    mean(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~lover(X0) | nice(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define pet_owner(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define love_animals(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

    grumpy(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.

for all inputs,
    define mean(X0) := $true
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
